sentences.english: Essentially, a theory is an abstract, symbolic representation of what is conceived to be reality.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“A theory is an abstract, symbolic representation”。what引导的一个名词性从句充当of的宾语。

sentences.english: Thanks to modern irrigation, crops now grow abundantly in areas where once nothing but cacti and sagebrush could live.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Thanks to modern irrigation, crops now grow abundantly”。句中where引导的定语从句修饰前面的areas。

n. 杀虫剂 记忆 pesti（=pest害虫）+cid（杀）+e→杀虫剂
v. 除草 记忆 种子（seed）在杂草（weed）中顽强生长 与“耕种、收割”相关的词：
v. 耕；耕作 记忆 cult（种植）+iv+ate（动词后缀）→耕种
v. 收割（庄稼）；收获 同根 reaper n. 收割机，收割者
n. 产量 同义 yield n. 产量
n. 产量；产出 vt. 出产（作物） 记忆 这片田地（field）出产（yield）西瓜
n. 谷仓 记忆 这个酒吧（bar）是由谷仓（barn）改建的
n. 仓库 记忆 ware（器皿）+house（房屋）→放器皿的房子→仓库
a. 多产的；丰富的 同义 productive a. 多产的 表示“现代农业生产设备”的词： bale loader 装草机，草捆装运机
n. 拖拉机 参考 tract n. 大片土地
n. 捆束机 同根 bind vt. 捆绑；包扎 clod crusher 碎土块机 farm machine 农业机械 field roller 滚压器
n. 割草机；收割机 同根 mow v. 割草
n. 抽水机 v. 用泵抽 搭配 water pump 水泵
n. 收割机 同义 harvester n. 收割机
n. 播种机 同根 seed n. 种子 v. 播种
n.脱粒机 同根 thresh vt./n. 打谷
n. 除草机 同根 weed n. 杂草 v. 除草 weeding machine 除草机 与“植物，植被”相关的词：
n. 植物，植被 同义 plant n. 植物
n. 植物群 同根 floral a. 植物的
n. 柳，柳树 记忆 把枕头（pillow）晒在柳树（willow）上
n. 白杨
n. 棕榈树 搭配 palm tree棕榈树
n. 松树 参考 pineapple n. 菠萝
n. 灌木 记忆 sh+rub（摩擦）→走过灌木丛，被擦伤了→灌木
n. 藻类 同义 seaweed n. 海藻
n. 蕨，蕨类植物
n. 藓，苔
n. 苔原
n. 灌木丛林地
n. 树皮 搭配 pine bark松树皮
n. 树干；躯干 同义 stem n. 茎，干
n. 嫩枝，小枝
a. 常绿的 搭配 evergreen tree 常绿树
n. 一簇（灌木） 搭配 a cluster of flower 一簇花

sentences.english: Anthropologists have discovered that fear, happiness, sadness, and surprise are universally reflected in facial expressions.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Anthropologists have discovered that ...”。句中that引导一个宾语从句，该宾语从句的主语是“fear, happiness, sadness, and surprise”。

words.definition: n.人类学家，人类学者 记忆 anthrop（人，人类）+olog+ist（从事某研究的人）→研究人类的学者→人类学家 同义 humanist n. 人类学者 同根 anthropology n. 人类学 anthropological a. 人类学的 参考 anthropoid a. 似人的 n. 类人猿
vt. 发现；发觉 记忆 dis（除去）＋cover（盖）→把盖揭开→发现 同根 discovery n. 发现，发觉
ad. 普遍地，到处，人人 记忆 uni（单一）+vers（转）+al+ly（…地）→一个旋转着的整体空间地→宇宙地→普遍地 同根 universe n.宇宙；世界 universal a. 普遍的；宇宙的
vt. 显示；反省，深思；反映 记忆 re（向后）+flect（弯曲）→向后弯曲→反射 同义 indicate v. 显示 同根 reflection n. 反射；思考，想法
a. 面部的，表面 记忆 fac（脸，面部）＋ial（…的）→面部的 搭配 facial foam 洁面泡沫 facial recognition 面部识别
n. 表示，表达，表现；表情，神色；词语，措辞 记忆 ex（出）＋press（挤压）→把（思想）挤出来→表达 同义 manifestation n. 表现 diction n. 措辞，用语 同根 expressive a. 有表现力的，富有表情的
a. 吓呆的，惊骇的 搭配 aghast at sth. 惊呆于…
vt. 使惊骇，使恐怖 同根 appalling a. 令人震惊的
a. 懦弱的，畏缩的 同义 cowardly a. 怯懦的
vi. 起鸡皮疙瘩 n. 毛骨悚然 同根 creepy a. 令人毛骨悚然的
vt. 害怕，担忧 同根 dreadful a. 糟糕的
n. 惊吓 搭配 stage fright怯场
a. 惊呆的 同根 petrify v. 惊呆；石化
a. 恐惧的 搭配 be terrified of 对…感到惊恐
vt. 使害怕，使惊恐 记忆 terr（恐吓）+ify（使…）→使害怕
a. 胆怯的，怯懦的 搭配 as timid as a hare 胆小如鼠
n./vi. 发抖 同根 trembling a. 颤抖的 表达“快乐”的词：
n. 狂喜 同根 ecstatic a. 狂喜的
n. 欣喜 同根 exalt vt. 提拔；提升
n. 高兴，活跃，愉快 同根 exhilarate vt. 使高兴
vt. 使满意，使高兴 同根 gratification n. 满意；喜悦
n./v. 咧着嘴笑 搭配 grin and bear it 默默忍受
vt. （使）沉醉，（使）欣喜若狂 同根 intoxication n. 陶醉
a. 欢快的 同根 merrily ad. 高兴地；愉快地
n. 欢乐，欢笑，高兴
a. 极度高兴的 搭配 overjoyed at sth. 因…欣喜若狂
v. 高兴，欣喜 搭配 rejoice in因…感到欣喜 表达“悲伤”的词：
vt. 使委屈；使痛苦 记忆 ag（加强）+griev（重）+e→加重（烦恼）→使痛苦
n. 极度的痛苦，创痛；苦恼 搭配 in agony痛苦不堪
n. 痛苦 搭配 in anguish在痛苦中
vt. 表示悲痛 记忆 de（表加强）+plor（流泪；哭泣）+e→悲痛
n. 危难，不幸 vt. 使悲伤；使苦恼 搭配 distress signal遇险（呼救）信号
n. 悲哀 同根 doleful a. 悲哀的
n. 悲伤；不幸 搭配 come to grief 遭受不幸；失败，倒霉
vt. 使悲伤；使伤心 搭配 grieve for哀悼
n. 悲伤；恸哭 记忆 lame（瘸的）+nt→瘸了腿所以悲伤→悲伤
n. 痛苦；悲惨的境遇 搭配 live in misery and want 过贫苦匮乏的生活
v. 哀悼，忧伤 搭配 mourn for 悼念
n. 悲痛；悲伤；伤心事 搭配 sorrow at对…感到悲伤
n. 痛苦 搭配 inner torment 内心的煎熬 表达“惊奇”的词：
vt. 使惊讶，使吃惊 搭配 astonish at对…感到惊讶
vt. 使震惊 同根 astounding a. 令人震惊的
a. 难以置信的 记忆 fa（说）+bul+ous→代代相传的寓言→难以置信的
a. 难以置信的 搭配 inconceivable disaster 难以想象的灾难
a. 难以置信的 搭配 incredible style 难以置信的风格
a. 令人惊异的 同根 marvel n./v. 惊异；惊奇
vt. 惊吓；使吃惊 搭配 startle response 吃惊反应
a. 惊人的 同根 strike vt. 打；击 n. 罢工
a. 令人震惊的 同根 stun vt. 使震惊；打昏 n. 昏倒 常见专家类别：

n. 考古学家 同根 archaeology n. 考古学
n. 天文学家 同根 astronomy n. 天文学
n. 生态学家 同根 ecology n. 生态学
n. 人种学家 同根 ethnology n. 人种学
n. 昆虫学家 同根 entomology n. 昆虫学
n. 语言学家 同根 linguistics n. 语言学
n. 神经学家 同根 neurology n. 神经学
n. 鸟类学家 同根 ornithology n. 鸟类学
n. 病理学家 同根 pathology n. 病理学
n. 分类学家 同根 taxonomy n. 分类学
n. 占星家 同根 astrology n. 占星学
n. 生理学家 同根 physiology n. 生理学
n. 地质学家 同根 geology n. 地质学

n. 哲学家 同根 philosophy n. 哲学
n. 地震学家 同根 seismology n. 地震学

sentences.english: Of the millions who saw Haley’s Comet in 1986, how many people will live long enough to see it return in the twenty-first century.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是How many people will live long enough to see it return in the twenty-first century。这句看似一个普通的疑问句，但实际上含有感叹句的功能。

words.definition: n. 彗星 记忆 come（来）+t→很多年才来一次的星星→彗星 同根 cometary a. 彗星的 Halley’s Comet 哈雷彗星（以英国科学家哈雷的名字命名，公转周期是76年）
n. 地球
n. 木星 记忆 朱庇特（Jupiter）是罗马神话中的天神
n. 火星 记忆 马尔斯（Mars）是罗马神话中的战神
n. 水星 记忆 墨丘利（Mercury）罗马神话中天神Jupiter的儿子，担任诸神的使者
n. 海王星 记忆 涅普顿（Neptune）是罗马神话中的海神
n. 土星 记忆 萨杜恩（Saturn）是罗马神话中的农业之神，排在Jupiter之后
n. 天王星 记忆 乌拉诺斯（Uranus）是希腊神话中的天空之神
n. 金星 记忆 维纳斯（Venus）是罗马神话中爱与美的女神 常见星体：
n. 小行星 记忆 aster（星星）+oid（形状）→小行星 dwarf planet 矮行星
n. 流星 同根 meteoric a. 流星的 meteor shower 流星雨
n. 流星体 同根 meteor n. 流星 natural satellite天然卫星
n. 行星 同根 planetary a. 行星的 planetoid n. 小行星
n. 冥王星
n. 类星体 记忆 qu＋a＋sar（看作star，星星）→类星体
n. 卫星 搭配 weather satellite 气象卫星
n. 恒星 terrestrial planet 类地行星 与“天体运转”相关的词：
n. 日食，月食 搭配
n. 赤道 记忆 equat（=equate平均）+or→将地球进行等分→赤道
n. 地平线 同根 horizontal a. 地平线的
n. 轨道 同根 orbital a. 轨道的
vi. 旋转 搭配 revolve around围绕…转动
v. 旋转 同义 twirl v. 旋转 其他天体星系常见词： astronomical unit天文单位
n. 天文学 同根 astronomical a. 天文学的
n. 晕（日光或月光通过云层中冰晶经折射而形成的光环） Big Bang 宇宙大爆炸 black mole 黑子
a. 天体的 搭配 celestial body 天体
n. 星座
n. 宇宙 同义 universe n. 宇宙
n. 星系；银河系 同义 Milky Way 银河
a. 星系间的 同根 galactic a. 银河的
a. 星际的 同根 stellar a. 恒星的，星球的
a. 月亮的 搭配 lunar calendar 农历
n. 陨石 搭配 meteorite impact 陨石撞击
n. 星云 同根 nebular a. 星云的，星云状的 outer space 外太空 planetary system 行星系
a. 太阳的 搭配 solar system 太阳系 solar radiation 太阳辐射 space station 太空站 star cluster 星团 sun’s rays 太阳光
vi. 闪烁 记忆 twinkle, twinkle, little star 一闪一闪小星星
n. 虫洞

sentences.english: The greater the population there is in a locality, the greater the need there is for water, transportation, and disposal of refuse.
sentences.grammar: 这是一个“the more ..., the more”的句型，表示“越…，就越…”，是一个复合句。

sentences.english: Perfectly matched pearls, strung into a necklace, bring a far higher price than the same pearls sold individually.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Perfectly matched pearls bring a far higher price。过去分词matched表被动，作前置定语修饰pearls；strung into a necklace是过去分词短语作后置定语；a far higher price than是比较结构，比较的对象是“perfectly matched pearls, strung into a necklace”和the same pearls sold individually。

sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Studies indicate that ...”。that引导宾语从句，该宾语从句的主干是its crust and mantle yield。其后的when引导一个状语从句，作宾语从句的时间状语。

sentences.english: Quails typically have short rounded wings that enable them to spring into full flight instantly when disturbed in their hiding places.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Quails typically have short rounded wings。句中that引导一个定语从句，修饰wings。该定语从句中又包含一个when引导的时间状语从句。

sentences.english: Fungi are important in the process of decay, which returns ingredients to the soil, enhances soil fertility, and decomposes animal debris.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Fungi are important。which引导的定语从句用来修饰the process of decay。该定语从句中有三个并列的谓语：returns、enhances和decomposes。

sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Most substance contract，句中when引导的从句作其时间状语。so that引导整个句子的结果状语从句。

sentences.english: Although apparently rigid, bones exhibit a degree of elasticity that enables the skeleton to withstand considerable impact.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Bones exhibit a degree of elasticity。句中的that引导定语从句，修饰前面的elasticity。句首的although apparently rigid作整句的让步状语。

sentences.english: Finally, the coughing reflex in reaction to irritants in the airway produces not a cough during sleep but a cessation of breathing.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是The reflex produces not a cough but a cessation。“not ... but ...”句型强调的是but后的部分；介词短语in reaction to irritants in the airway作定语，修饰前面的the coughing reflex，其中reaction to sb./sth.是固定搭配，意为“对某人或某事的反应、回应”。

words.definition: n. 反射；反射动作；本能反应 记忆 re（反）+flex（弯曲）→反向弯曲→反射 搭配 reflex action 本能反应；反射作用 同根 reflexion n. 反射；反映；映像 reflexive a. （词语）反身的；反射的

n. 气道；航线 记忆 air（空气）+way（道路）→气道

sentences.english: But when consumers do not know they are being lobbied, they may accept claims they would otherwise be suspicious of.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是They may accept claims。句中when引导时间状语从句，其中they are being lobbied是省略that的宾语从句，作动词know的宾语。句末的they would otherwise be suspicious of是省略that的定语从句，该定语从句修饰claims。

words.definition: n. 消费者，用户 记忆 con（表加强）+sum（拿，取）+er（人）→全部拿出来（花掉）的人→消费者 同根 consume v. 消费；耗尽

sentences.english: Buyers and sellers should be aware of new developments in technology which can and does affect marketing activities.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Buyers and sellers should be aware of new developments in technology。句中which引导的定语从句修饰technology。

sentences.english: Lucretia Mott’s influence was so significant that she has been credited by some authorities as the originator of feminism in the United States.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Lucretia Mott’s influence was so significant that ...”。“so ... that ...”表示“如此…以至于…”，that引导的是一个结果状语从句。

sentences.english: By fossils, we mean traces of prehistoric animals such as bones, which become mineralized, or impressions of bones or organs that are left in stone.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是“By fossils, we mean traces of prehistoric animals”。句中such as后是由or连接的两个并列成分，即bones和impressions of bones or organs，这两个并列成分后面分别带有一个定语从句。其中bones后是which引导的非限制性定语从句，impressions of bones or organs后是that引导的定语从句。

sentences.english: Even though the precise qualities of hero in literary words may vary over time, the basic exemplary function of the hero seems to remain constant.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是The function of the hero seems to remain constant。句中even though引导让步状语从句。

words.definition: a. 准确的，精确的 记忆 preci（价值，价格）+se→定价一般都很准确→准确的 搭配 to be precise 准确地说 同义 exact a. 精确的，准确的 accurate a. 正确无误的，精确的 反义 imprecise a. 不精确的 同根 precisely ad. 精确地；正好

sentences.english: Since the consumer considers the best fruit to be that which is the most attractive, the grower must provide products that satisfy the discerning eye.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是The grower must provide products。句首是since引导的原因状语从句，这个从句的主干是The consumer considers the best fruit to be that，其中that是代词，指代fruit，后面的which is the most attractive是定语从句，修饰前面的代词that，表明水果应该是什么样的。句子主干中的that satisfy the discerning eye是定语从句，修饰products。

sentences.english: With no oceans to dissolve it, outgassed carbon dioxide began to accumulate in the atmosphere, intensifying the greenhouse effect even more.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是Carbon dioxide began to accumulate in the atmosphere。句首是with引导的独立主格结构。句尾的intensifying the greenhouse effect even more是现在分词短语作结果状语。

sentences.english: Research into the dynamics of storms is directed toward improving the ability to predict these events and thus to minimize damage and avoid loss of life.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Research is directed toward improving the ability。ability之后的不定式“to predict ... and thus to minimize ... and avoid ...”作ability的后置定语。

sentences.english: Their streamlined bodies, the absence of hind legs, and the presence of a fluke and blowhole cannot disguise their affinities with land dwelling mammals.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Their bodies, the absence of ..., and the presence of ... cannot disguise their affinities with ...”。句子的主语较长，由三个名词短语构成。

sentences.english: Scientists do not know why dinosaurs became extinct, but some theories postulate that changes in geography, climate, and sea levels were responsible.
sentences.grammar: 本句中but连接了两个并列的分句。第一个分句含有一个why引导的宾语从句，第一个分句的主干是“scientists do not know why ...”；第二个分句含有一个that引导的宾语从句，第二个分句的主干是“theories postulate that ...”。

words.definition: n. 恐龙 记忆 dino（恐怖的）+saur（蜥蜴）→恐龙 参考 tyrannosaur n. 霸王龙 pterosaur n. 翼龙
a. 灭绝的，不存在的 记忆 ex（出）+tinct（刺）→用针刺使没有→灭绝的 搭配 an extinct species 已灭绝的物种 extinct volcano 死火山 同根 extinction n. 灭绝
vt./n. 假定，假设 记忆 postul（要求）+ate→要求→假定，假设 同根 postulation n. 假定
n. 地理学 记忆 geo（地球）+graph（画）+y→画地球的图→地理学 同根 geology n. 地质学 geologist n. 地质学家
a. 有责任感的，负责的 记忆 re（再，又）+spons（承诺，约定）+ible（能…的）→一再遵守承诺的→有责任感的 同根 responsibility n. 责任，职责
n. 雷龙
n. 陨石球粒
n. 火山口；陨石坑，弹坑

v. （使）蒸发；消失，不复存在 同根 evaporation n. 蒸发；消失
a. 进化的，发展的 搭配 evolutionary psychology 进化心理学
n. 化石；老顽固 a. 陈腐的；化石的 同根 fossilize vt. 使成化石 fossilized a. 成化石的；腐朽的
v. 假定，假设 同根 hypothetical a. 假设的
n. 共栖，互利共生 同根 mutual a. 共同的
n. 石化；惊呆 同义 fossilization n. 石化
a. 原始的，最初的；基本的 同义 primeval a. 原始的 primitive a. 原始的
a. 基本的 同根 fundamentalist n. 原教旨主义者；基要主义者
n. 行进，进程 同根 progress vi. 前进；进步
n. 规律性，规则性，整齐 搭配 regularity assumption 规律性假定
n. 补救，整治；修复 搭配 remediation goal 修复目标
n. 更新；复兴；补充 同根 renew vt. 更新
n. 弹力；适应性；（指人）乐观的性情 搭配 ecosystem resilience 生态系统复原性
a. 有弹性的，适应力强的 记忆 re（一再）+sili（跳）+ent（关于…的）→能反复跳起来的→有弹性的
a. 抵抗的，有抵抗力的；抗…的 搭配 drought-resistant crops 抗旱作物
a. 缺乏的，稀有的，罕见的 同根 scarcely ad. 几乎不；刚刚 scarcity n. 缺乏，不足
n. 挑选；精选；被挑选出来的人（或物） 同义 choice n. 选择
a. 共生的，共栖的 搭配 symbiotic bacteria 共生菌 与“生态环境”相关的词： air-water interaction 空气与水的相互作用
n. 生物；有机体 contaminated land 污染的土地
n. 生态环境 记忆 eco（生态）+environment（环境）→生态环境 endangered species 濒危物种 global warming 全球变暖 greenhouse effect 温室效应 greenhouse gas 温室气体
n. 水圈，水界 记忆 hydro（水）+spher（球）+e→地球的水→水圈 inorganic environment 无机环境 land carrying capacity 土地承载能力 land use classification 土地使用分类 law of the jungle 弱肉强食；丛林法则
n. 改造 同根 modify vt. 修改 precipitation enhancement 降水增加
n. 复原；恢复活力 同根 rejuvenate vt. 复原 sea level rise 海平面上升
n. 防护物；盾 vt. 保卫，庇护 搭配 shield off 挡开；避开 solar radiation 太阳辐射
a. 周围的；环境的 同根 surround vt. 围绕，环绕
n. 蒸腾作用 同根 transpire v. 蒸发；排出

sentences.english: The elimination of inflation would ensure that the amount of money used in repaying a loan would have the same value as the amount of money borrowed.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“The elimination of inflation would ensure that ...”，其中that引导一个宾语从句。

words.definition: n. 消除，除去 记忆 e（除去）+limin（限制）+ation（表名词）→消除对事物的限制→消除 同根 eliminate vt. 消除；淘汰
n. 膨胀；通货膨胀 搭配 currency inflation 通货膨胀 反义 deflation n. 通货紧缩
vt. 确保，担保 记忆 en（使…）+sur（确定的）+e→确保 参考 assure vt. 确保；使确信 insure vt. 给…保险
v. 偿还，归还 搭配 repay a loan 还清贷款 同根 repayment n. 偿还债务
n./v. 贷款；借出 记忆 “漏”→因为把钱借出去了，所以账本有漏洞→借出 搭配 loan interest rate 贷款利率
n. 增值 搭配 currency appreciation 货币升值 budget deficit 预算赤字 circulating medium 流通媒介
n. 货币 搭配 currency exchange 货币兑换 credit currency 信用货币 currency circulation 货币流通 currency issue 货币发行
n. 通货紧缩 搭配 deflation policy 紧缩政策
vt. （尤指为税收）折旧；贬低 vi. 贬值 同根 depreciation n. 贬值；折旧
a. 金融的，财政的 搭配 financial deficit 财政赤字 macro control 宏观调控 means of payment 支付手段
a. 货币的，财政的 同根 monetarist n. 货币主义者 monetary policy 货币政策 money supply 货币总量，货币供应量
a. 金钱的 搭配 pecuniary loss 金钱上的损失 price level 价格水平 virtual currency 虚拟货币 与“借贷与租赁”相关的词：
vt. 分期偿还 同根 amortization n. 分期偿还
n. 借方 记忆 borrow（借）+er（表人）→借方 collateralized loan 抵押贷款
n. 信誉；贷方 搭配 credit balance 贷方余额
n. 最后期限 记忆 dead（死亡）+line（线）→最后期限
n. 借方 vt. 把…记入借方 搭配 debit balance借方余额 debt collector 讨债人
n. 债务 搭配 be in debt 负债
n. 延期 同根 extensive a. 大量的，广泛的
n./vt. 担保 搭配 loan guarantee 贷款担保 high credit risk 高信贷风险 high default risk 高违约风险 high interest rate 高利率 high-risk loan 高风险贷款 high-value loan 高价值贷款
n. 分期付款 搭配 installment payment 分期付款
n. 出借人，贷方 搭配 lender of last resort 最后放贷人 long-term loan 长期贷款
vt. 抵消 搭配 be offset by由…抵消
n. 逾期 记忆 over（超过）+time（时间）→逾期 short-term loan 短期贷款
n./v. 代替 搭配 substitute A for B以B代替A
n. 保证人 记忆 warrant（保证）+or（表人）→保证人 表示“经济繁荣”的词：
n. 繁荣 vi. 迅速发展；激增 搭配 economic boom 经济繁荣
vt. 促进，增加 搭配 boost the economy 促进经济发展
a. 兴隆的 搭配 brisk trade 贸易兴隆 business boom 商业繁荣 economic development 经济发展
v. （使）逐步扩大 搭配 escalate into 逐步升级为
n. 动力，势头 搭配 economic momentum 经济势头
vt. 超过…的速度，赶过 记忆 out（超过）+ pace（速度）→赶过
vi. 火箭式上升；猛升 记忆 sky（天空）+rocket（火箭）→火箭升空；猛升
n. 刺激；促进（因素） 搭配 fiscal stimulus 财政刺激 表示“经济衰退”的词： bank crisis 银行危机 banking panic 银行业恐慌 bubble economy 泡沫经济
n. 收缩，紧缩 搭配 economic contraction 经济萎缩 credit risk 信用危机 currency crisis 货币危机 debt crisis 债务危机
n. 不景气 搭配 economic depression 经济萧条
v. 使（货币）贬值 同根 devaluation n. 贬值
n. 低迷时期，衰退 搭配 in downturn 在衰退中 economic downturn 经济低迷时期 economic slump 经济衰退 file for bankruptcy 申请破产 financial crisis 金融危机 financial storm 金融风暴 financial tsunami 金融海啸 fiscal deficit 财政赤字
n. 波动 搭配 price fluctuation 价格波动
a. 黯淡的；沮丧的 记忆 gloom（昏暗）+y→黯淡的 housing crisis 房地产危机 IMF （International Monetary Fund） abbr. 世界货币基金组织
n. 猛跌，骤降 搭配 stock plunge 股票暴跌
a. 未来的，预期的 搭配 prospective earnings 预期收益
n. 衰退 搭配 in recession 处于衰退时期
n. 复苏 搭配 recovery from从…中复苏
a. 不活跃的；不景气的 搭配 slack time 低迷时期
a. 萧条的 搭配 sluggish market 萧条的市场
n. 拮据，紧缺 v. 挤压 搭配 squeeze into 挤进
a. 不景气的；停滞的 搭配 stagnant economy 经济萧条

n. 衡量 搭配 measurement accuracy 测量精度 mixed economy 混合经济
v. 优化 同根 optimization n. 优化 planned economy 计划经济 reform and opening up 改革开放 rural economy 农村经济 socialist economy 社会主义经济

sentences.english: Futurism, an early twentieth-century movement in art, rejected all traditions and attempted to glorify contemporary life by emphasizing the machine and motion.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Futurism rejected all traditions and attempted to glorify contemporary life。句中的an early twentieth-century movement in art是插入语，补充说明futurism。

words.definition: n. 未来派；未来主义论 记忆 futur（e）（未来）+ism（表示学术或学术流派）→未来派 参考 atheism n. 无神论 atomism n. 原子论
vt. 拒绝；抛弃 记忆 re（反）+ject（扔）→被扔回来→拒绝 同根 rejection n. 拒绝；抛弃
vt. 美化；赞扬 记忆 glor（光荣）+ify（使…）→美化；赞扬 同根 glory n. 光荣；赞扬
vt. 强调，着重 记忆 em（表加强）+phas（说）+ize→强调 同根 emphasis n. 强调，重点
n. 运动，移动 记忆 mot（移动）+ion（名词后缀）→运动，移动 搭配 put sth. in motion 让…运转起来 同根 motionless a. 不动的，静止的
n. 抽象；提取 同根 abstracted a. 出神的，心不在焉的 artistic movements 艺术思潮
n. 组合；结合 同根 combine v. 联合；结合
n. 立方主义 同根 cubist n. 立体派艺术家 dynamic state 动态
n. 确定；鉴别；认同 同根 identity n. 身份
vt. 使具体化 同根 incarnation n. 化身
v. 综合；使完整 同根 integration n. 综合，融合
n. 表现 同根 manifest vt. 证明；显示
n. 复活；复兴 同根 resurrect vt. 复活；复兴
n. 感觉；轰动 同根 sensitive a. 敏感的 static state 静态 modernist aesthetics 现代主义美学 20世纪艺术流派：
n. 抽象派 同根 abstract a. 抽象的；抽象派的
n. 达达主义 同根 Dadaist n. 达达主义艺术家
n. 表现主义 同根 expressionist n. 表现主义艺术家
n. 野兽派 同根 Fauve n. 野兽派画家
n. 高度写实主义 同根 hyperrealist n. 高度写实主义艺术家
n. 现代主义 同根 modernist n. 现代主义者 pop art 波普艺术，通俗艺术
n. 现实主义 搭配 critical realism 批判现实主义
n. 超现实主义 同根 surreal a. 超现实主义的 常见艺术学词汇：
n. 唯美主义 同根 aestheticist n. 唯美主义者
n. 前卫派 同根 avant-gardism n. 先锋主义
n. 自传作家 同根 biography n. 传记
n. 舞蹈编排家 同根 choreography n. 编舞
n. 保守主义 同根 conservation n. 保存；保持
n. 构成派 同根 constructivist n. 构成主义者
n. 批评家 同根 criticism n. 批评
n. 风格；体裁 记忆 gen（种属）+re→风格；体裁
n. 意象派诗人 同根 imagism n. 意象派
n. 印象主义者 同根 impressionism n. 印象派 literary elitism 文学精英论
n. 极简抽象派艺术家 同根 minimalism n. 极简派艺术
n. 新古典主义 同根 neoclassicist n. 新古典主义者 poetic works 诗作
n. 纯粹派 同根 purity n. 纯度；纯粹
n. 文艺复兴时期 搭配 Renaissance art文艺复兴时期的艺术
n. 装饰主义；洛可可 a. 洛可可式的 记忆 18世纪流行于欧洲的装饰风格
n. 浪漫主义 搭配 neo-romantism 新浪漫主义
n. 讽刺作家 同根 satirise vt. 讽刺
n. 简约主义 同根 simplify vt. 简化
n. 领域；范围 记忆 terr（地）+it+ory（表地点）→领域
a. 空想的；乌托邦的 同根 utopia n. 乌托邦；理想国

sentences.english: Acids are chemical compounds that, in water solution, have a sharp taste, a corrosive action on metals, and the ability to turn certain blue vegetable dyes red.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Acids are chemical compounds。其后的that引导一个定语从句修饰compounds。

words.definition: n. 酸，酸性物质 搭配 acid rain 酸雨 同根 acidic a. 酸性的 acidity n. 酸性
n. 化合物，混合物 记忆 com（共同）+pound（放置）→放到一起使合成→化合物 搭配 chemical compound 化合物 compound eye 复眼 同义 mixture n. 混合物
n. 溶液；解决（办法） 记忆 solu（溶解）+tion→让其充分溶解→溶液 搭配 water solution水溶液 saline solution盐溶液 同义 liquor n. 溶液
a. 强烈的；锋利的；敏锐的 搭配 sharp mind敏锐的头脑 同根 sharply ad. 急剧地 sharpen v. 削尖
a. 腐蚀（性）的 搭配 corrosive effect 腐蚀性作用 同根 corrode v. 侵蚀，腐蚀 corrosion n. 腐蚀
n. 金属 记忆 奖牌（medal）是用金属（metal）做的 搭配 metal detector金属检测器
n. 颜料，染料 记忆 劣质染料（dye）会致人死亡（die） 搭配 synthetic dye合成染料 hair dye染发剂
n. 会计学 同根 accountant n. 会计师
n. 农学，农业 搭配 sustainable agriculture 可持续农业
n. 人类学 记忆 anthrop（人，人类）+ology（…学）→人类学
n. 建筑学，建筑业 搭配 classical architecture 古典建筑 archival science 档案学
n. 生物 同根 biological a. 生物学的
n. 植物学 同根 botanical a. 植物学的 botanist n. 植物学家 civil engineering 土木工程（学）
n. 生态学 同根 ecological a. 生态学的
n. 经济学 搭配 information economics 信息经济学 electronic engineering 电子工程 environmental science 环境科学
n. 伦理学 记忆 eth（习俗）+ics→道德规范；伦理学
n. 人种学 记忆 ethn（民族，种族）+ology（…学）→民族学
n. 地质学 同根 geologist n. 地质学者 geological a. 地质学的
n. 语言学 搭配 comparative linguistics 比较语言学
n. 文学 记忆 liter（文字）+ature→文学；文学作品
n. 管理学 搭配 marketing management 市场营销
n. 数学 同根 mathematical a. 数学的

sentences.english: Offshore drilling platforms extend the search for oil to the ocean’s continental shelves—those gently sloping submarine regions at the edges of the continents.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Platforms extend the search to the continental shelves。破折号后面的名词短语“those gently sloping ... continents”对the ocean’s continental shelves起解释说明的作用。

sentences.english: Even those artists who were most dependent on photography became reluctant to admit that they made use of it, in case this compromised their professional standing.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Those artists became reluctant to ...”，其中who引导一个定语从句修饰artists。admit后的that引导一个宾语从句。in case引导的目的状语从句作整个句子的状语。

a. 不情愿的，勉强的 记忆 “驴拉坦克”→不情愿的，勉强的 同义 unwilling a. 不情愿的 同根 reluctance n. 不情愿；勉强
vt. （尤指因行为很不明智）使陷入危险，使受到怀疑 n./vi. 妥协，折中 记忆 com（共同）+promise（保证）→相互保证→妥协 同根 compromising a. 有失体面的
a. 专业的；职业的 记忆 pro（在前）+fess（说，表达） +ion→在前面发言→专业的 反义 amateur a. 业余的 同根 profession n. 专业；职业
n. 业余爱好；副业 记忆 a（非）+vocation（职业）→非职业→副业

n. 光斑 vi. 闪光 同义 sparkle vi. 闪光
n. 闪光灯 记忆 flash（闪光）+light（灯）→闪光灯
v. （使）聚焦 n. （眼睛或镜头的）焦距 搭配 auto focus 自动对焦 focus length 焦距 high speed photography 高速摄影

n. 全景照片 同根 panoramic a. 全景的
n. 影印；复印 记忆 photo（照片）+copy（复制）→复印
n. 影印 记忆 photo（照片）+print（打印）→影印 photograph album 相册
n. 像素 搭配 pixel size 像素大小

n./v. 给…拍快照

a. 容易使用的 参考 environment-friendly a. 环境友好的

sentences.english: According to anthropologists, the earliest ancestors of humans that stood upright resembled chimpanzees facially, with sloping foreheads and protruding brows.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是The ancestors resembled chimpanzees。定语从句that stood upright修饰humans；介词短语with sloping foreheads and protruding brows中，现在分词sloping和protruding作前置定语分别修饰foreheads和brows，整个介词短语在从句中作伴随状语。

words.definition: n. 祖先；先驱；原型 记忆 an（加强）+cest（=cess走）+or（表人）→走了很久的人→祖先 同根 ancestral a. 祖先的；祖传的 参考 ancestry n. 世系，血统
a. 垂直的；直立的；正直的 记忆 up（向上）+right（正确的）→向上是正确方向→直立的 同义 vertical a. 垂直的
vt. 与…相似，像 记忆 re（再，又）+sembl（一样，相同）+e→ 与…相似，像 同根 resemblance n. 相似，相像
n. 黑猩猩
ad. 面部地 记忆 facial（面部的）+ly→面部地 同根 facial a. 脸部的
v. （使）伸出，突出 记忆 pro（向前）+trud（推）+e→向前推→突出 同根 protrusive a. 伸出来的，突出的
vt. 使适应 搭配 adapt oneself to 使自己适应…
n. 古代；古老 biophysical environment 生物物理环境
vi. 迅速成长 记忆 burg（=bud花蕾）+eon→像花蕾一样成长→迅速成长 cave man 穴居人 common descent 共同起源
a. 颅骨的 搭配 cranial cavity 颅腔
n. 达尔文 同根 Darwinism n. 达尔文学说
vi. 退化 同根 degradation n. 退化
n. 后裔，子孙 同根 descend vi. 遗传；下降；起源（于） directional selection 定向选择 ecological anthropologist 生态人类学家 evolutionary change 进化变异
v. （使）逐渐形成；发展；（使）进化 同根 evolution n. 进化 evolutionary a. 进化的
n. 灭绝 搭配 species extinction 物种灭绝 food chain 食物链
n. 原始人类；人（科） 记忆 homin（=hum人）+id（如…的）→原始人类
a. 同种族（种类）的 记忆 homo（同类的）+gene（基因）+ous→基因相同的→同类的
n. 形态学 同根 morphological a. 形态学的 natural selection 自然选择
n. 后代，子孙 同义 descendant n. 后代
n. 起源 搭配 origin of species 物种起源
vt. 生长速度超过…；长得太大不再需要…
n. 古人类学家 同根 paleoanthropology n. 古人类学 psychological anthropologist 心理人类学家
n. 幸存，生存 搭配 survival of the fittest适者生存 weed out 淘汰 与“古代部落”相关的词： centralized management 集中式管理，集权管理
n. 首领的地位 记忆 chief（首领）+dom（表名词）→首领的地位
n. 文明 同根 civilian n. 平民
n. 宗族；家族 记忆 家族（clan）的形成是因为上帝用泥土（clay）造出人
n. 遗产；遗骸 同根 remainder n. 余数；剩余物 rock painting 岩画
n. 遗迹，废墟 搭配 building ruins 建筑遗迹
n. 接替；继承 同根 successive a. 接替的；继承的
n. 优胜者 a. 上级的 同根 superiority n. 优势
n. 部落 同根 tribal a. 部落的；种族的 Stone Age 石器时代 Neolithic Age 新石器时代 Paleolithic Age 旧石器时代 Mesolithic Age 中石器时代的 与“灵长类动物”相关的词：
n. 猿
n. 狒狒 biological diversity 生物多样性
n. 两足动物的 搭配 erect bipedal primate 直立两足灵长类动物
n. 物种，繁殖 参考 inbreeding n. 同系繁殖，近亲交配
n. 幼兽
n. 大猩猩
n. 幼虫 vi. 搜寻 搭配 grub sth. out 挖出
n. 栖息地 同根 habitation n. 居所

n. 栖息于，居住在 同根 inhabitation n. 居住；栖息

sentences.english: Anarchism is a term describing a cluster of doctrines and attitudes whose principal uniting feature is the belief that government is both harmful and unnecessary.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Anarchism is a term。现在分词短语“describing a cluster ... unnecessary”作后置定语修饰a term，其中whose引导一个定语从句修饰a cluster of doctrines and attitudes。该定语从句中又包含一个that引导的同位语从句解释说明the belief。

words.definition: n. 无政府主义 记忆 an（无）+arch（统治者）+ism（表主义）→无统治→无政府主义 同根 anarchist n. 无政府主义者 anarchic a. 无政府的，无政府主义的
n. 群；丛；（物品的）堆，批 vi. 聚集 记忆 clust（=clot凝块）+er→凝成块→聚集 同义 clump v. 聚集，被聚集成群
n. 学说；教义 记忆 doctr（=doct教导） +ine（表名词）→用于教导的→教义 同根 doctrinaire n. 教条主义者
a. 主要的 n. 资本；校长 记忆 prin（第一的）+cip（抓）+al（…的）→作为第一（要务）来抓的→主要的 参考 principle n. 原则
n. 政府；管理 记忆 govern（统治）+ment（表名词）→政府 同根 govern v. 管理；控制
a. 不必要的 记忆 un（不）+necessary（必需的）→不必需的→不必要的 同根 necessary a. 必要的；必需的
n. 管理人；行政人员 同根 administrative a. 行政的；管理的
vt. 断言，声称 同根 alleged a. 据称的
vt. 承认；公开宣称 记忆 a（加强）+vow（发誓；许愿）→公开宣称
n. 宪章；宣言 vt. 发许可证；特许 记忆 和chart（n. 航图；图表）一起记
n. 凝聚；结合 搭配 cohesion force凝聚力
n. 协调；一致性 同根 consistent a. 一致的
vt. 支配，控制，统治 同根 domination n. 支配，控制 dominance n. 统治
vt. 颁布；制定法律 同根 enactment n. 规定，制定；颁布
n. 统治，支配；管理 记忆 govern（管理）+ance（表名词）→管理
vt. （使）生效；实施；执行 搭配 implement plan执行计划
n. 宏观调控 记忆 macro（宏大）+control（控制）→宏观调控
vt. 维持 同根 maintenance n. 维持；保养
n. 授权；命令 v. 授权；颁布 同根 mandatory n. 受托人 a. 强制的
v. 许可；允许 同根 permissible a. 容许的，可准许的
a. 全权的；全体出席的 搭配 plenary power全权
a. 务实的；实事求是的；实用主义的 搭配 pragmatic approach实际的方法
vt. 禁止；阻止 同根 prohibition n. 禁止，阻止；禁令
vt. 管理，控制；调节 同根 regulation n. 管理，控制；调节
vt. 保卫 记忆 safe（安全）+guard（保卫）→保卫 social security 社会保障
vt. 使处于次要地位；使服从 同根 subordination n. 从属；附属
vt. 监督 同根 supervision n. 监督
a. 切实可行的 搭配 viable option可行选项 与“社会动荡”相关的词：
n. 加重；恶化 同根 aggravate vt. 加重；恶化
n. 敌意，憎恨 搭配 animus against sb./sth. 对…有敌意
n. 暴行 同根 atrocious a. 残暴的
a. 好战的，交战的 搭配 belligerent act交战行为
n. 囚禁 搭配 in captivity受限制的
vi. 合作；通敌 搭配 collaborate with与…合作
n. 合作，勾结 搭配 project collaboration项目协作
n. 反驳；矛盾 搭配 a contradiction in terms 用词自相矛盾的话
n. 背叛 同根 defector n. 背叛者；逃兵
n. 挑战，蔑视 同根 defiant a. 公然违抗的
a. 狡猾的；蓄意的 同义 cunning a. 狡猾的
n. 威慑物 搭配 deterrent force 威慑力量
n. 惨败 同义 catastrophe n. 惨败
a. 令人恐惧的 搭配 frightening experience 令人恐惧的经历
n. 贪心；贪婪 同义 cupidity n. 贪婪
a. 不协调的 反义 congruent a. 一致的；协调的
n. 不协调，不适宜 反义 congruity n. 协调；一致
n. 不公平 搭配 gender inequity 性别不平等
n. 拦截；截断 搭配 direct interception 直接截取 illegal interception 非法截取
v. 横贯；交叉 同根 intersected a. 分割的
n. 接合；连接 记忆 junct（连接）+ure（表名词）→连接
n. 大混乱；大漩涡 同义 chaos n. 混乱
n. 威胁 搭配 security menace 安全威胁

sentences.english: A rotary engine attached to the steam engine enabled shafts to be turned and machines to be driven, resulting in mills using steam power to spin and weave cotton.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是A rotary engine enabled shafts to be turned and machines to be driven。句中attached to the steam engine是过去分词短语作后置定语修饰a rotary engine。句子的后半部分resulting in mills using steam power to spin and weave cotton是现在分词短语在句尾作结果状语，其中还包含一个现在分词短语using steam power to spin and weave cotton作后置定语修饰mills。

sentences.english: A mountain range may emerge and gradually split a population of organisms that can inhabit only lowland lakes; certain fish populations might become isolated in this way.
sentences.grammar: 本句是由分号连接的两个并列分句。第一个分句的主干是A mountain range may emerge and split a population，定语从句that can inhabit only lowland lakes修饰organisms；第二个分句的主干是Populations might become isolated。

sentences.english: Think of it this way, humans originally needed to have a stronger sensitivity to bitter-tasting foods so they could learn what plants were good for them and which ones might be poisonous.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Humans needed to have a sensitivity。sensitivity与后面的介词to是固定搭配；so作连词引导目的状语从句。what plants were good for them和which ones might be poisonous通过and并列，一起作动词learn的宾语。

sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是The settlers erected farms。句首的because引导原因状语从句。现在分词短语separating the forest from the prairie作后置定语修饰the boundary。

sentences.english: If the artificial Sun remained stationary, the birds would shift their direction with respect to it at a rate of about 15 degrees per hour, the Sun’s rate of movement across the sky.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是The birds would shift direction。句子开头是if引导的条件状语从句，句子结尾处的名词短语the Sun’s rate of movement across the sky是同位语，解释说明前面的15 degrees per hour。

sentences.english: The Industrial Revolution had several roots, one of which was a commercial revolution that, beginning as far back as the sixteenth century, accompanied Europe’s expansion overseas.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是The Industrial Revolution had roots。which引导的非限制性定语从句修饰roots，其中又嵌入了一个that引导的定语从句修饰commercial revolution。现在分词短语beginning as far back as the sixteenth century在that引导的定语从句中作伴随状语。

sentences.english: The jaw joints of many advanced herbivores, such as cows, lie at a different level than the tooth row, allowing transverse tearing, shredding, and compression of plant material.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是The jaw joints lie at a different level than the tooth row。“allowing ... plant material”是非谓语结构作伴随状语，其中tearing、shredding和compression作allowing的并列宾语。

sentences.english: So musical instruments evolved in ways that optimize their acoustical properties—how the instrument vibrates and sends those vibration through the air to our eardrums.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是“Musical instruments evolved in ways that ...”。句中that引导的定语从句修饰ways，how引导的同位语从句解释说明acoustical properties。

sentences.english: German printers had the disadvantage of working with the complex typeface that the Italians sneeringly referred to as “Gothic” and that later became known as black letter.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Printers had the disadvantage of ...”。其后有两个that引导的定语从句“that the Italians sneeringly referred to as ...”和“that later became known as ...”，两者都用来修饰the complex typeface。

sentences.english: Elizabeth Blackwell, the first woman medical doctor in the United States, founded the New York Infirmary, an institution that has always had a completely female medical staff.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是Elizabeth Blackwell founded the New York Infirmary。其中the first woman medical doctor in the United States是Elizabeth Blackwell的同位语；“an institution that ... medical staff”是the New York Infirmary的同位语，这个同位语结构中还有一个that引导的定语从句修饰an institution。

sentences.english: We’ve gone over where coral reefs are usually formed—along the edges of shallow ocean banks in tropical or subtropical regions, and the fact that they are declining at an alarming rate.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是“We’ve gone over where ... and the fact that ...”。句中的where coral reefs are usually formed和“the fact that ...”是并列成分，一起作主句的宾语，其中where引导宾语从句，that引导the fact的同位语从句。破折号后面的along the edges of shallow ocean banks in tropical or subtropical regions是解释说明前面提到的where coral reefs are usually formed。

sentences.english: Raised beaches often consist of areas of sand, pebbles, or dunes, sometimes containing seashells or piles of debris comprising shells and bones of marine animals used by humans.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Raised beaches often consist of areas of sand, pebbles, or dunes”。containing是现在分词，引导伴随状语，表示与谓语动词consist of同时进行。现在分词短语“comprising shells ... by humans”作后置定语，修饰piles of debris。

sentences.english: But as more and more accumulations of strata were cataloged in more and more places, it became clear that the sequences of rocks sometimes differed from region to region and that no rock type was ever going to become a reliable time marker throughout the world.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“It became clear that ... and that ...”。其中两个that分别引导一个主语从句，作本句真正的主语：that the sequences differed from region to region and that no rock type was going to become a time marker throughout the world。句首的as引导一个原因状语从句。

sentences.english: This was an important innovation, because the camel’s abilities to thrive in harsh desert conditions and to carry large loads cheaply made it an effective and efficient means of transportation.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是This was an innovation。其后是由because引导的原因状语从句，从句的主干是The camel’s abilities made it a means of transportation。ability to do sth.是固定搭配，表示做某事的能力。

sentences.english: These people exploited the landscape intensively, foraging on hill slopes for wild cereal grasses and nuts, while hunting gazelle and other game on grassy lowlands and in river valleys.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是People exploited the landscape。while连接两个并列的现在分词短语“foraging ... nuts”和“hunting ... valleys”，这两个现在分词短语作状语，表示伴随状态。

ad. 集约地；集中地 同根 intense a. 强烈的；认真的 intensity n. 强度 intensive a. 密集的；精耕细作的 参考 extensive a. 大量的，广泛的

n. 高峰，顶峰；顶点 记忆 pinn（顶点）+acle（表物）→高峰
n. 平原 搭配 coastal plain沿海平原 strand plain滨海平原
n. 高原 搭配 plateau phenomenon高原现象

sentences.english: The recognition that many aspects of the modern flora and fauna were present on both sides of the Bering Sea as remnants of the ice-age landscape led to this region being named Beringia.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是The recognition led to this region being named Beringia。同位语从句“that many aspects ... landscape”用于解释说明the recognition，从句中的as作介词，后接一个名词短语。

words.definition: n. 承认；认出 记忆 来自recognize（vt. 认出；承认） 搭配 social recognition 社会认同 同根 recognizable a. 可辨认的 recognized a. 公认的
n. 方面；特征，外观 同义 respect n. 尊敬；方面 dimension n. 维；方面 facet n. 面；（问题等的）方面 参考 inspect vt. 检查 prospect n. 景色；前景
a. 现代的 记忆 mod（方式）＋ern（…性质的）→（现在的）方式→现代的 搭配 modern poetry 现代诗 同根 modernity n. 现代性
n. 植物群 记忆 来自Flora（弗洛拉，希腊神话中的花神） 同根 floral a. 植物群的
n. 动物群 记忆 来自Fannus（潘纳斯，罗马神话中的动物之神）
a. 出现；（事物或物质）存在 搭配 present in sth. 存在于…
n. 残余部分；残迹 搭配 the remnants of the sun残阳 同义 remains n. 剩余，残余；遗迹
n. 风景；地貌，地形 记忆 land（陆地）+scape（景色）→地貌 同义 landform n. 地形
vt. 承认 记忆 ac+know（知道）+ledge→大家都知道了，所以不得不承认→承认
vi. 默许 参考 acquiescent a. 默认的，顺从的 acquiescence n. 默许
v. 承认 同根 admittedly ad. 公认地
vt. 采用；正式通过 同根 adoption n. 采用
vt. 断言 记忆 af（加强）+firm（坚定的）→断言
a. 欣然同意的 记忆 来自agree（v. 同意，赞成）
v. 批准；对…表示认可 同根 approval n. 赞成；批准 disapproval n. 不赞成
n./vi. 同意，赞成 记忆 as（加强）+sent（感觉）→感觉一样→同意
vt. 授权；批准 同根 authorization n. 授权；认可 unauthorized a. 未授权的
v. 承认 参考 cede vt. 割让，放弃 accede vi. 同意 recede vi. 后退 precede v. 领先
v. 意见相同；同时发生 记忆 con（共同）＋cur（跑）→同时发生
n. 供认 记忆 con（加强）＋fess（说）+ion→全部说出→供认
vt. 证实；批准；确认 同根 confirmation n. 证明；确认
n. 共识，一致同意；舆论 记忆 con（共同）+sens（感觉）+us→感觉相同→共识
vi./n. 同意 记忆 con（共同）+sent（感觉）→有共同的感觉→同意，赞成
vt. 签署，批准 记忆 en（在…里）+dors（背后）+e→（在支票背后）签名→签署
vt. 给予；允许 记忆 授予（grant）显赫的（grand）贵族爵位
n. 许可证 搭配 driving license 驾驶执照
v. （表赞同或理解而）点头
v. 允许 同根 permission n. 许可
vt. 正式批准 记忆 rat（计算）+ify（使…）→通过计算证实→正式批准
n. 接纳 搭配 reception desk （旅馆、饭店等的）接待处
vt. 许可 记忆 sanct（神圣的）+ion→神圣之物，原指教会的法令，后引申为“同意，许可”→许可
a. 全体一致的 记忆 un（一个）+anim（精神）+ous→大家都秉持同一种精神的→一致同意的
n. 授权，批准 记忆 warr（看作war，战争）+ant（蚂蚁）→战争中一旦得到授权令开战后就是杀人如蚁→授权

v. 意见相同；同时发生 记忆 con（共同）＋cur（跑）→同时发生
n. 供认 记忆 con（加强）＋fess（说）+ion→全部说出→供认
vt. 证实；批准；确认 同根 confirmation n. 证明；确认
n. 共识，一致同意；舆论 记忆 con（共同）+sens（感觉）+us→感觉相同→共识
vi./n. 同意 记忆 con（共同）+sent（感觉）→有共同的感觉→同意，赞成
vt. 签署，批准 记忆 en（在…里）+dors（背后）+e→（在支票背后）签名→签署

v. （表赞同或理解而）点头
v. 允许 同根 permission n. 许可
vt. 正式批准 记忆 rat（计算）+ify（使…）→通过计算证实→正式批准
n. 接纳 搭配 reception desk （旅馆、饭店等的）接待处

a. 全体一致的 记忆 un（一个）+anim（精神）+ous→大家都秉持同一种精神的→一致同意的

sentences.english: Thus, the recalling of an event （a hunt, battle, or other feat） is elaborated through the narrator’s pantomime and impersonation and eventually through each role being assumed by a different person.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Thus, the recalling is elaborated through ... and through ...”。each role being assumed by a different person是动名词的复合结构。

ad. 终于，最后 同根 eventual a. 最终的 eventuality n. 可能发生的事情（结果）

sentences.english: The extreme seriousness of desertification results from the vast areas of land and the tremendous numbers of people affected, as well as from the great difficulty of reversing or even slowing the process.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“The seriousness results from ... and ..., as well as from ... or ...”。results from后面并列了四个名词短语，分别是the vast areas of land、the tremendous numbers of people affected、the great difficulty of reversing以及slowing the process，其中slowing the process前面省略了the great difficulty of。

n. 结果 vi. （作为结果）发生 搭配 result from因…发生；随…产生 result in造成 同义 consequence n. 结果，后果 outcome n. 结果，成果

n. 分贝（声音强度单位）

v. 变坏；恶化

a. 一次性的 搭配 disposable chopsticks一次性筷子

n. 排放 搭配 zero-emission 零排放，无污染 environmental issue 环境问题 environmental pollution 环境污染
n. 恶化，加重 记忆 ex（使）＋acerb（酸）＋ation→使变酸→恶化

a. 放射性的 记忆 radi（光线）+o+act（行动）+ive→光线行动活跃的→放射性的 sea level rise 海平面上升

n. 煤烟 water pollution 水污染 white pollution 白色污染

sentences.english: Before starting on a sea voyage, prudent navigators learn the sea charts, study the sailing directions, and memorize lighthouse locations to prepare themselves for any conditions they might encounter.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Navigators learn the charts, study the directions, and memorize locations”。句首的before后面接的是动名词形式。句末的“to prepare ... encounter”是目的状语，其中包含的定语从句they might encounter修饰conditions，该定语从句的关系代词that在从句中省略。

sentences.english: The question of why infantile amnesia occurs has intrigued psychologists for decades, especially in light of ample evidence that infants and young children can display impressive memory capabilities.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是The question has intrigued psychologists。句中的that引导同位语从句“that infants ... capabilities”，用于解释说明evidence。

a. 充足的；丰富的；宽敞的 记忆 市场上苹果（apple）很充足（ample） 同义 abundant a. 丰富的；充裕的 参考 trample v. 踩，践踏 amble vi. 缓行

a. 神经病学上的 搭配 neurological disorder 神经障碍

sentences.english: Researchers can drill core samples, uh, basically get a cross-section of a tree without having to kill it, look at the rings and get a picture of what the climate was like in the basin for each of the tree’s years.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Researchers can drill samples, get a cross-section, look at the rings and get a picture”。主句的四个谓语动词分别为drill、get、look at和get，通过逗号和and并列连接。

sentences.english: Great Britain’s better-developed banking and credit system also helped speed the industrial progress, as did the fact that it was the home of an impressive array of entrepreneurs and inventors.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Banking and credit system also helped speed the progress。句中as引导一个状语从句，表示“像…一样”，该从句倒装；其中又包含一个由that引导的同位语从句，用于解释说明the fact。

sentences.english: Confronted with a multitude of unreliable figures, economists have compared the population records with the aggregate data for cultivated land area and grain production in the six centuries since 1368.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是economists have compared the records with the data。句首是过去分词形式的非谓语结构，表示被动，逻辑主语是economists。

sentences.english: Apparently, species-rich plots were likely to contain some drought-resistant plant species that grew better in drought years, compensating for the poor growth of less-tolerant species.

sentences.english: Even more shocking is the fact that the number and rate of imprisonment have more than doubled over the past twenty years, and recidivism—that is the rate for re-arrest—is more than 60 percent.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是Even more shocking is the fact。这个句子的表语even more shocking置于句首，在be动词之前，整句话是倒装句。在“the fact that ... more than 60 percent”中，第一个that引导同位语从句，解释说明the fact，同位语从句由and连接两个简单句，分别是“the number and rate ... over the past twenty years”和“recidivism ... more than 60 percent”。

sentences.english: These plants propagate by producing spores—tiny fertilized cells that contain all the instructions for making a new plant—but the spores are unprotected by any outer coating and carry no supply of nutrient.
sentences.grammar: 这是一个含有but的并列复合句。第一个分句的主干是“These plants propagate by ...”；第二个分句的主干是“The spores are unprotected by ... and carry no supply ...”。定语从句that contain all the instructions for making a new plant修饰tiny fertilized cells。同位语tiny fertilized cells指的是前面的spores。

sentences.english: Meanwhile, the deadliest strains of the virus perished with their hosts as natural selection favored strains that could infect hosts but not kill them. Thus, natural selection stabilized this host-parasite relationship.
sentences.grammar: 第一个句子的主干是The strains perished。as引导原因状语从句“as natural selection favored ... not kill them”，其中又包含一个由that引导的定语从句，修饰前面的名词strains。第二个句子的主干是Natural selection stabilized relationship。

words.definition: n. （动、植物的）系，品系；压力；拉伤 vt. 拉伤；过度使用 搭配 strain at the leash急于开始；迫不及待 同根 strained a. 紧张的；勉强的 参考 constrain vt. 驱使；强迫 overstrain vt./n. 过度紧张

vt. 传染，感染 记忆 in（进入）+fect（做）→做进去→传染 同根 infection n. 传染，感染；传染病 infectious a. 传染性的；有感染力的

sentences.english: The residence time is the average length of time that any particular molecule of water remains in the lake, and it is calculated by dividing the volume of water in the lake by the rate at which water leaves the lake.
sentences.grammar: 这是一个由and连接的并列复合句。第一个分句的主干是The residence time is the average length of time，其后由that引导一个定语从句。第二个分句的主干是“It is calculated by ...”，其中定语从句at which water leaves the lake修饰前面的名词the rate。

sentences.english: An eye is a collection of cells that are specialized for light detection through the presence of photosensitive pigment as well as a means of restricting the direction of incoming light that will strike the photosensitive cells.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“An eye is a collection of cells ... as well as a means ...”，as well as连接并列成分a collection of cells和a means。第一个that引导的定语从句“that are specialized ... pigment”修饰cells；第二个that引导的定语从句that will strike the photosensitive cells修饰incoming light。

sentences.english: Sociologists view primary groups as bridges between individuals and the larger society because they transmit, mediate, and interpret a society’s cultural patterns and provide the sense of oneness so critical for social solidarity.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Sociologists view primary groups as bridges。because引导一个原因状语从句，该从句的主语是they，从句通过and连接了两个并列的谓语，分别是“transmit, mediate, and interpret a society’s cultural patterns”和“provide the sense of oneness so critical for social solidarity”。

sentences.english: Importing the grain, which would have been expensive and time consuming for the Dutch to have produced themselves, kept the price of grain low and thus stimulated individual demand for other foodstuffs and consumer goods.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Importing the grain kept the price low and thus stimulated demand。which引导一个非限定性定语从句，修饰前面的名词the grain。定语从句中would have been expensive and time consuming用的是虚拟语气，表示与过去事实相反。

sentences.english: While the men who make faithful copies of sand paintings from the past represent the principle of stability in Navajo thought, women embody dynamism and create new designs for every weaving they make.
sentences.grammar: 本句while作并列连词，连接了两个完整的句子，表示两者间的对比。第一个分句的主干是The men represent the principle of stability；who引导定语从句修饰the men。第二个分句的主干是Women embody dynamism and create designs；省略了关系代词that的定语从句they make修饰weaving。

sentences.english: In turn, a deep attachment to the land, and to the stability which rural life engenders, fostered the Roman virtues: gravitas, a sense of responsibility, pietas, a sense of devotion to family and country, and iustitia, a sense of the natural order.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“A deep attachment fostered the virtues: gravitas, pietas, and iustitia”。attachment to是固定搭配，意为“对…的依恋”，本句中attachment to后用and并列连接the land和the stability。定语从句which rural life engenders修饰前面的stability。冒号后面有三个并列的名词：gravitas，pietas和iustitia，每个名词后面都用一个名词短语作为同位语来解释说明该名词的含义。

sentences.english: In contrast to mammals and birds, amphibians are unable to produce thermal energy through their metabolic activity, which would allow them to regulate their body temperature independent of the surrounding or ambient temperature.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Amphibians are unable to produce thermal energy。定语从句“which would allow ... ambient temperature”修饰前面的句子，定语从句中的independent of the surrounding or ambient temperature是形容词短语，说明谓语动词regulate发生的方式。

sentences.english: This is because the gaps among the original grains are often not totally plugged with cementing chemicals; also, parts of the original grains may become dissolved by percolating groundwater, either while consolidation is taking place or at any time afterwards.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“This is because ...”。because引导的表语从句才是本句的主要内容，其主干是“ the gaps are not plugged with chemicals; also, parts of ... may become dissolved by groundwater, either ... or ...”。

sentences.english: The growth of mutual trust among merchants facilitated the growth of sales on credit and led to new developments in finance, such as the bill of exchange, a device that made the long, slow, and very dangerous shipment of coins unnecessary.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是The growth of mutual trust facilitated the growth of sales on credit and led to new developments in finance。名词短语“a device that ... shipment of coins unnecessary”作the bill of exchange的同位语，起解释说明作用，其中a device后是that引导的定语从句。

sentences.english: Widely reported, if somewhat distrusted, accounts by figures like the famous traveler from Venice, Marco Polo, of the willingness of people in China to trade with Europeans and of the immensity of the wealth to be gained by such contact made the idea irresistible.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Accounts made the idea irresistible。句首的过去分词短语widely reported作伴随状语，和主句主语accounts在逻辑上构成被动关系。if somewhat distrusted是插入语，其主语即主句主语accounts。短语accounts by sb. of sth.是一种固定搭配，意为“某人做出的关于某事的描述”。句中and连接了两个并列的内容：“of the willingness of ... Europeans”和“of the immensity of ... contact”。

a. 无法抗拒的；不能自已的 记忆 ir（不）+resistible（可抵抗的）→不可抵抗的→无法抗拒的 反义 resistible a. 可抵抗的

sentences.english: In the wake of the Roman Empire’s conquest of Britain in the first century A.D., a large number of troops stayed in the new province, and these troops had a considerable impact on Britain with their camps, fortifications, and participation in the local economy.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“troops stayed in the province, and troops had a（n） impact on Britain”。句中的in the wake of sb./sth.是固定搭配，意为“随…之后而来；跟随在…之后”；介词短语“with their camps ... economy”作状语。

words.definition: n. 战胜；征服；战利品 记忆 con（加强）+quest（获得）→获得全部资源→征服 同根 conquer vt. 战胜；征服 conqueror n. 征服者
n. 军队 vi. 结队 记忆 部队（troop）里的一群（group）人 搭配 special troop 特种兵 同义 military n. 军队
n. 省；领域 同义 state n. 州；省 同根 provincial a. 省的；地方性的
n. 防御工事；碉堡；加强 记忆 fort（力量）+ific（做）+ation→增强力量的东西→防御工事 同根 fortify vt. 筑防御工事；加强
n. 参加；参与 记忆 part（i）（=part分开）+cip（拿）+ation（名词后缀）→将身体拿进去→参与 同根 participate vi. 参与，参加 participator n. 参与者
n. 海军将领，舰队司令 同根 admiralty n. 海军部 air force 空军 air-defense unit 防空部队 allied troop 联军
a. 装甲的 搭配 armored forces 装甲部队

n. 军营 同根 barracking n. 喝倒彩；奚落

n. 元帅；总指挥
a. 海军的 搭配 naval officer 海军军官

n. 中士，警官 搭配 sergeant major 军士长

n. 情报 搭配 intelligence agency 情报局
n. 闯入者 同义 intruder n. 侵入者

n. 军事演习 v. 操纵；（军队等）调遣 记忆 man（手）+eu+ver（工作）→用手来做→操纵

v. 动员；调动；集合 搭配 mobilize the army 调动军队
n. 反叛者，背叛者 同义 betrayer n. 叛徒

sentences.english: While many programs designed for preschoolers focus primarily on social and emotional factors, some are geared mainly toward promoting cognitive gains and preparing preschoolers for the formal instruction they will experience when they start kindergarten.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Some are geared toward promoting gains and preparing preschoolers。while引导状语从句，其主干是programs focus on factors，过去分词短语designed for preschoolers修饰名词programs。定语从句“they will experience ... kindergarten”修饰the formal instruction，引导定语从句的关系代词在从句中作宾语，因此被省略；定语从句中又含有一个when引导的时间状语从句when they start kindergarten。

sentences.english: Hero compiled descriptions and sketches of 70 some clever little, mechanical devices, most of which utilized compressed air to cause water, or in some cases, wine to flow from one place to another, or sometimes to squirt or to make some kind of noise.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Hero compiled descriptions and sketches。which引导的非限定性定语从句修饰前面的名词短语“70 some clever little, mechanical devices”。定语从句的主干是most of which utilized compressed air，其中过去分词compressed表被动，作前置定语修饰air；cause sth. to do sth.是固定搭配，意为“使某物做某事”，句中的water和wine通过or并列，to flow、to squirt和to make也是通过or并列。

sentences.english: Introducing genetically modified trees, designed for fast growth and high yield in given geographic conditions, would satisfy the demand for wood in many of those areas and save the endangered native trees, which often include unique or rare species.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是Introducing genetically modified trees would satisfy the demand for wood and save the endangered native trees。句首的introducing genetically modified trees是动名词，作主语，其中过去分词modified作前置定语修饰trees；过去分词短语designed for fast growth and high yield in given geographic conditions作非限制性定语，修饰genetically modified trees。句尾which 引导的非限制性定语从句修饰前面的the endangered native trees。

sentences.english: In the 1760s, James Watt perfected a separate condenser for the steam, so that the cylinder did not have to be cooled at every stroke; then he devised a way to make the piston turn a wheel and thus convert reciprocating （back and forth） motion into rotary motion.
sentences.grammar: 本句包含两个并列的分句，由分号连接。第一个分句的主干是James Watt perfected a condenser；so that引导的结果状语从句的主干是the cylinder did not have to be cooled。第二个分句的主干是“He devised a way and convert ... into ...”，其中a way to do sth.是固定搭配，意为“做某事的方式”，convert sth. into sth.也是固定搭配，意为“将…转变为…”，reciprocating作为现在分词修饰后面的名词motion。

sentences.english: Unlike short-term financial cooperation between investors for a single commercial undertaking, joint-stock companies provided permanent funding of capital by drawing on the investments of merchants and other investors who purchased shares in the company.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Joint-stock companies provided permanent funding of capital。其后的“by drawing on ... in the company”为方式状语，其中含有一个who引导的定语从句修饰investors。句首的“unlike short-term ... undertaking”作整句的比较状语。

sentences.english: This was justified by the view that reflective practice could help teachers to feel more intellectually involved in their role and work in teaching and enable them to cope with the paucity of scientific fact and the uncertainty of knowledge in the discipline of teaching.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是this was justified by the view。从句“that practice could help ... in the discipline of teaching”作为同位语从句解释说明view。同位语从句的主语是reflective practice，谓语动词是could help和enable；其中feel more intellectually involved in their role中过去分词形式的形容词involved作feel的表语；cope with后由and并列连接the paucity of scientific fact和the uncertainty of knowledge in the discipline of teaching。

sentences.english: There were no other large public buildings, suggesting that the priests who were in charge of the temples also were responsible for governing the city and organizing people to work in the fields and on irrigation projects building and maintaining systems of ditches and dams.
sentences.grammar: 本句主干是There were no other large public buildings。句中“suggesting that ... ditches and dams”作伴随状语；suggesting后是that引导的宾语从句，该宾语从句的主干是“The priests were responsible for governing ... and organizing ... and maintaining ...”；定语从句who were in charge of the temples修饰the priests；in the fields和on irrigation projects building是由and连接的并列结构，一起作work的状语。

sentences.english: Inequalities of wealth and rank certainly exist, and have probably existed in most pastoralist societies, but except in periods of military conquest, they are normally too slight to generate the stable, hereditary hierarchies that are usually implied by the use of the term class.
sentences.grammar: 本句中but连接了两个句子。第一个句子的主语是inequalities of wealth and rank，句中有两个并列谓语，即exist和have probably existed。第二个句子的主干是they are too slight to generate hierarchies，其中they指代inequalities of wealth and rank，定语从句that are usually implied by the use of the term class修饰前面的hierarchies。

sentences.english: Many ecologists now think that the relative long-term stability of climax communities comes not from diversity but from the “patchiness” of the environment; an environment that varies from place to place supports more kinds of organisms than an environment that is uniform.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“Ecologists think that ...”。that引导的宾语从句中包含两个分句：第一个分句的主干是“The stability comes not from ... but from ...”；第二个分句的主干是“An environment supports more kinds ... than an environment ...”，第二个分句中的两个environment后都带有一个that引导的定语从句，分别是that varies from place to place和that is uniform。

sentences.english: According to conventional theory, yawning takes place when people are bored or sleepy and serves the function of increasing alertness by reversing, through deeper breathing, the drop in blood oxygen levels that are caused by the shallow breathing that accompanies lack of sleep or boredom.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Yawning takes place and serves the function。句中的when people are bored or sleepy是时间状语从句；“by+doing”是固定搭配，意为“通过做…”，作方式状语。定语从句that are caused by the shallow breathing和that accompanies lack of sleep or boredom分别修饰the drop in blood oxygen levels和the shallow breathing。

sentences.english: Contrary to the arguments of some that much of the Pacific was settled by Polynesians accidentally marooned after being lost and adrift, it seems reasonable that this feat was accomplished by deliberate colonization expeditions that set out fully stocked with food and domesticated plants and animals.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是It seems reasonable that。that引导一个主语从句，该主语从句的主干是This feat was accomplished by colonization expeditions。expeditions后有一个that引导的定语从句，从句中的过去分词短语stocked with food and domesticated plants and animals在从句中充当状语，表示伴随状态。句首的状语“contrary to ... lost and adrift”中包含一个that引导的同位语从句“that much of the Pacific ... adrift”，用于解释说明the arguments，从句中的过去分词短语accidentally marooned作后置定语修饰Polynesians。

words.definition: n./a. 相反 记忆 contra（反）+ry→相反的 搭配 on the contrary相反 同义 opposite a. 相反的
n. 争论；论据 记忆 来自argue（v. 争论；主张） 同义 controversy n. 争论，辩论 dispute n. 争论；纠纷 the Pacific 太平洋
v. 安定，安顿；（使）定居 记忆 sett （=set，放置）+le（表动词）→安定，安顿 搭配 settle down 平静；定居，过安定的生活
n. 波利尼西亚人
ad. 意外地，偶然地 记忆 ac（向）+cid（落，掉）+ent+ally→东西从天而降落向某人→意外地 同根 accident n. 意外事件，事故 accidental a. 意外的，偶然的
vt. 困住，使无法逃脱 同义 strand vt. 搁浅
a. 迷路的；迷失的
a. 漂浮；漂流 同根 drift n./v. 漂流；漂泊
a. 合理的；有道理的 记忆 reason（道理）+able（能…的）→能讲道理的→有道理的 搭配 a reasonable excuse合理的借口 同根 unreasonable a. 不合理的 reasoned a. 理性的 reasoning n. 推理，论证
vt. 达到；完成 记忆 ac（向）+compl（填满）+ish→给填满→完成 同义 complete vt. 完成 同根 accomplishment n. 成就
a. 审慎的，深思熟虑的；有准备的 记忆 de（表加强）+liber（考虑）+ate→反复权衡→审慎的 同根 deliberately ad. 故意地；深思熟虑地
n. 殖民地化 记忆 来自colonize（vt. 殖民化，殖民地化）
n. 远征（队）；探险（队） 记忆 ex（出）+ped（脚）+ition→出行→远征；探险 set out 出发，启程
n. 库存 vt. 库存，储备 搭配 stock up 备货，囤积
vt. 驯养，驯化 记忆 来自domestic（a. 家庭的） 同根 domesticated a. 驯养的，家养的 domestication n. 驯养，驯服
n. 解释；考虑 搭配 take ... into account 考虑，重视
vi. 苦苦思索 记忆 agon（挣扎）+ize→苦苦挣扎→苦苦思索
v. 咀嚼；思量 搭配 chew over 深思熟虑；详细讨论
vt. 构思 记忆 con（共同）+ceiv（抓）+e→一起抓住（思想） →构思
v. 认为；考虑 搭配 consider sth. done 当作…做完了 considered to be 被认为是…
a. 考虑周到的 同根 inconsiderate a. 不体贴的；轻率的
v. 盘算；沉思 同根 contemplation n. 沉思，思考 contemplative a. 爱思考的
vt. 不再考虑；解雇 记忆 dis（分开）+miss（送）→送出→解雇
vt. （思想，回忆等）萦绕在心头
v. 回忆起 记忆 re（向后）+call（想）→回忆起

v. 沉思，冥想 同根 meditation n. 冥想，沉思

a. 沉思的 记忆 pens（悬挂）+ive→悬挂于心的→沉思的

a. 有机的 同根 organism n. 有机体
a. （肉）过老的 参考 overcooked a. 煮得过久的
a. 美味的，可口的 反义 unpalatable a. 不好吃的

n. 蛋白质 记忆 prot（首先）+ein→维持生命最需要之物→蛋白质

a. 美味的；绝妙的，极好的 同根 scrummy a. 美味的
n. 腐败；变质 同根 spoil vt. 糟蹋

sentences.english: The Athenian philosopher Socrates （470-399 B.C.） was the first person in Greece to propose a morality based on individual conscience rather than the demands of the state, and for this he was accused of not believing in the city’s gods and so corrupting the youth, and he was condemned to death.
sentences.grammar: 本句由两个and连接了三个并列的分句，这三个分句的主干分别是“Socrates was the first person to propose a morality”、“ He was accused of ...”、“He was condemned to death”。第一个分句中的过去分词短语based on individual conscience rather than the demands of the state修饰morality。第二个分句中的be accused of doing sth.是固定搭配，意为“被指控做过某事”，其中not believing in the city’s gods和corrupting the youth是通过and连接的并列成分。

words.definition: a. 雅典的；雅典人的 记忆 来自Athens（n. 雅典）
n. 哲学家 记忆 philo（爱）+soph（聪明，智慧）+er→爱智慧的学问→哲学→哲学家 同根 philosophy n. 哲学 philosophic a. 哲学的
n. 希腊 参考 Greek n. 希腊人；希腊语
vt. 建议，提议 记忆 pro（在…前面）+pos（放）+e→放在前面→在行动之前提出→建议，提议 同根 proposal（n. 提案，建议）
n. 道德 记忆 mor（风俗，习惯）+ality→全社会约定俗成→道德 同根 moral a. 道德的 moralism n. 道德教育，道德准则 moralistic a. 道德观念的
n. 基础 vt. 把（总部等）设在；以…为根据 记忆 bas（底部）+e→基础 搭配 be based on基于…
n. 个人；个体 a. 个人的；个别的 记忆 in（不）+di（二）+vid（分开）+ual（有…性质的）→不能一分为二的→个人的 同义 personal a. 个人的，私人的 同根 individually ad. 个别地 individuality n. 个性 individualize vt. 赋予个性
n. 良心，良知 记忆 con（共同）+sci（知道）+ence→大家都知道，人要有良心→良心 同根 conscientious a. 凭良心的
v. 要求，需要 记忆 de（加强）+mand（命令）→一再令人做→要求 同义 require vt. 需要；要求 insist v. 坚持要求；坚决主张 同根 demanding a. 苛求的 参考 command v./n. 命令；指挥
vt. 谴责；指控 记忆 ac（反，逆）+cus（=caus，原因）+e→指责 搭配 accuse sb. of sth. 控告某人做过某事 同根 accusation n. 控告；谴责
vt. 腐化；使腐败，使堕落 记忆 cor（表加强）+rupt（断裂）→完全断裂→腐化 同根 corruption n. 贪污，腐败
vt. （因道义上的原因）谴责；判处（某人某种刑罚） 记忆 con（共同）+demn（惩罚）→共同惩罚→谴责 搭配 condemn sb. to sth. 判处某人…刑罚 同义 blame vt. 谴责，责备
n. 勇敢 记忆 来自brave （a. 勇敢的） civic virtue 公民道德 code of conduct 行为准则
n. 谦恭有礼 同根 courteous a. 谦恭的，有礼貌的
a. 勤奋的 同根 diligence n. 勤勉，勤奋
n. 宽恕 搭配 ask for forgiveness 请求宽恕
n. 诚信
n. 谦卑 记忆 hum（地）+ility→面朝地面→低的状态→谦卑 inner belief 内心信念
n. 正直；完整 记忆 integr（完整）+ity→完整
n. 仁慈 搭配 out of kindness 出于好意
n. 宽恕；仁慈 搭配 at the mercy of 完全受…的支配 moral example 道德榜样
n. 规范；准则 同义 criteria n. 标准，准则 standard n. 标准
n. 原则；道德准则 记忆 prin（主要）+cip（抓住）+le→握住主要原则→原则 public opinion 社会舆论
n. 责任（心） 搭配 shirk one’s responsibility 推卸责任 sharp mind 敏锐的头脑 social morality 社会公德
a. 诚实的，正直的
n. 英勇，勇猛
n. 美德；优点 同根 virtuous a. 有道德的
n. 意志力 表示“要求，命令”的词：
v./n. 声称；要求 记忆 本身为词根，意为“大声叫喊”→声称
n./v. 命令 同根 commander n. 司令官，指挥 commandment n. 戒律
a. 有义务的；强制性的 记忆 com（加强）+puls（推）+ory（有…性质的）→强制性的
v. 规定；命令 记忆 dict（讲话；命令）+ate→规定；决定
n. 强制的，法定的 记忆 mand （命令）+atory（有…性质的）→命令的
n. 要求；自命不凡 记忆 pre（预先）+tension（紧张）→预先感到紧张，要求放松下→要求
n./vt. 要求，请求 记忆 re（再，又）+quest（追求）→要求，请求
vt. 规定，明确要求 记忆 stip（压）+ul+ate（使…）→使一起按压→规定

sentences.english: Two additional kinds of evidence support the hypothesis that petroleum is a product of the decomposition of organic matter: oil possesses optical properties known only in hydrocarbons derived from organic matter, and oil contains nitrogen and certain compounds believed to originate only in living matter.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Two kinds of evidence support the hypothesis。同位语从句“that petroleum is a product of ...”解释说明the hypothesis。在冒号后的第一个分句“oil possesses ... organic matter”中，过去分词短语known only in hydrocarbons修饰optical properties，过去分词短语derived from organic matter修饰hydrocarbons。在第二个分句“oil contains ... in living matter”中，过去分词短语believed to originate only in living matter修饰certain compounds。

words.definition: a. 附加的，额外的 记忆 add（加）+ition（行为）+al（…的）→附加的 同根 addition n. 加；附加（物）
n. 证据；迹象 记忆 e（出）+vid（看）+ence→看出→证据；迹象 同义 proof n. 证据，证明 同根 evidential a. 提供证据的；作证的
n. 假设；前提 记忆 hypo（在…下面）+thes（放）+is→放在下面，还不作为正式的理论→假设 同根 hypothesize v. 假定，假设 hypothetical a. 假设的
n. 石油 记忆 petr（石）+ole（油）+um→石油 同根 petrifaction n. 石化作用
n. 分解；腐烂 记忆 de（相反）+compos（看作compose，组成）+ition→与组成相反→分解 同义 dissolution n. 分解 decay v./n. 腐烂；衰落 rot v./n. 腐烂 同根 decompose v. （使）分解；（使）腐烂
a. 有机的；器官的 搭配 organic matter 有机物质 organic chemistry 有机化学 organic being 有机体 参考 organism n. 生物体，有机体
a. 眼的；视力的；光学的 记忆 opt（视力）+ical→视力的 同根 optics n. 光学 optician n. 眼镜商
n. 碳氢化合物 记忆 hydro（水）+carbon（碳）→碳氢化合物
v. 取得；起源 记忆 de+rive（r）→黄河是中华文明的发源地→起源 搭配 derive from 源自

sentences.english: Though it may be difficult to imagine from a later perspective, a strain of critical opinion in the 1920s predicted that sound film would be a technical novelty that would soon fade from sight, just as had many previous attempts, dating well back before the First World War, to link images with recorded sound.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是“A strain of opinion predicted that ...”。That引导一个宾语从句，该宾语从句中包含一个that引导的定语从句that would soon fade from sight，修饰a technical novelty。其后又有一个as引导的状语从句“as had many ... recorded sound”，as表示“正如、像、和…一样”。现在分词短语dating well back before the First World War作后置定语修饰many previous attempts。

sentences.english: In the multiplicity of small-scale local egalitarian or quasi-egalitarian organizations for fellowship, worship, and production that flourished in this laissez-faire environment, individuals could interact with one another within a community of harmony and ideological equality, following their own popularly elected leaders and governing themselves by shared consensus while minimizing distinctions of wealth and power.
sentences.grammar: 本句的主干是Individuals could interact with one another。介词短语“in the multiplicity ... in this laissez-faire environment”作整句话的状语，其中包含一个that引导的定语从句“that flourished in this laissez-faire environment”修饰organizations。句尾的现在分词短语following their own popularly elected leaders and governing themselves by shared consensus作伴随状语。while引导的时间状语省略了individuals were。
